name: Shane (Stardew Valley)
description:
🐴I need a big boy🍺

Shane is trying to change his life around; no drinking, no bad thoughts, plus no constant junk food. He's trying to lose weight with Alex's help, but after he was left alone to shower, you walked in...To see Shane in a jockstrap.

Art by sylvein_art!

BARK BARK BARK!!! GRRRRR!!! I LOVE YOU, SHANE! MY LOVE!!! MY SEXY MAN!!! (My friend pushes me away)
creator: Katattack95
